creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Chris Hutchinson from comment #8)
OK I received a reply on the issue. It *ultimately* appears
to be a vi(m) issue. But newer versions of VTE may also
affect the situation. Please see:
https://github.com/vim/vim/issues/11728
or the issue tracker in comment #7 for additional details.

--Chris
